paper.title: Do You Need a Frontier Model as a Citation Verifier? Benchmarking Rubric LLMs for Deep-Research Source Attribution

release_search.paper_link_audit: The complete immutable v1 PDF and arXiv HTML expose no author-owned code, data, benchmark, repository, or supplemental release URL. The only external URLs printed in the manuscript are references; arXiv HTML's GitHub links are arXiv/LaTeXML infrastructure links.
queries: arXiv ID 2607.08700 with code and dataset terms
exact benchmark name Deep-Research Citation Benchmark
release_search.web_search_result: Targeted web searches on 2026-07-17 returned the arXiv record and third-party paper-index/summary pages, but no verifiable author-owned release.
release_search.boundary: These bounded searches establish only that no author-owned release was identified at acquisition time. They do not prove that no release exists or will later appear.

scope_limit: This acquisition run downloaded the complete immutable paper, API metadata, and arXiv HTML; extracted and spot-checked full text; and recorded a bounded official-release search. It did not perform the queued deep methodological review, reproduce paid model calls, validate the paper's human labels, or infer that the named golden_dataset.json is publicly available.
